rationale: The cited paper directly examines how tariff structure (including free allowances) changes existing customers’ plan choice and usage, while the citing paper centers on free-to-paid pricing design (hard vs. soft landing, introductory pricing) for converting existing users. Given this strong conceptual overlap on pricing/tariff mechanisms and customer response, and no evidence it is merely a generic background mention (only a DOI match is available), this pair should be retained for full relation judgment.
